description.en: A boolean that controls whether the impulse response from the buffer will be scaled by an equal-power normalization when thebufferattribute is set, or not.

excerpt.es: A boolean that controls whether the impulse response from the buffer will be scaled by an equal-power normalization when thebufferattribute is set, or not.
excerpt.en: A boolean that controls whether the impulse response from the buffer will be scaled by an equal-power normalization when thebufferattribute is set, or not.

description.en: Returns an integer representing the number of discrete audio channels described by the PCM data stored in the buffer.

excerpt.es: Returns an integer representing the number of discrete audio channels described by the PCM data stored in the buffer.
excerpt.en: Returns an integer representing the number of discrete audio channels described by the PCM data stored in the buffer.

description.en: Returns the number of inputs feeding the node. Source nodes are defined as nodes having anumberOfInputsproperty with a value of0.

excerpt.es: Returns the number of inputs feeding the node. Source nodes are defined as nodes having anumberOfInputsproperty with a value of0.
excerpt.en: Returns the number of inputs feeding the node. Source nodes are defined as nodes having anumberOfInputsproperty with a value of0.
